overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a desert canyon environment. The character travels from a narrow rocky canyon passage into an open desert landscape under clear skies with warm afternoon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon passage with high rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon passage toward the distant exit

entered.detail: tall red rock cliff face forming the left side of the canyon
tall red rock cliff face forming the right side of the canyon
sandy dirt path winding through the canyon floor
sparse green bushes and vegetation along the canyon edges
bright opening where the canyon ends in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow desert canyon passage flanked by high red rock walls on both sides. Sparse desert vegetation lines the sandy dirt path as the character moves toward a bright opening visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon transition zone widening into open desert

events.description: canyon walls recede to the sides as the path opens into a wider landscape

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon opens up revealing distant mesas and open sky

entered.detail: flat-topped rock formation visible on the horizon
loose boulders and rock debris along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The canyon gradually widens as the character approaches the exit. The rock walls fall away to the sides becoming distant formations, revealing a broader desert landscape with mesas and scattered vegetation under open sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with distant rock formations

events.description: fully exits the canyon into the open desert landscape

agents.ego_description: walking across the open desert terrain with distant rock formations visible on all sides

entered.detail: wide sandy desert floor with scattered small rocks
isolated rock formation rising from the desert floor

segments.scene_description: Now fully in the open desert, the character walks across a wide sandy plain surrounded by distant rock formations and low hills. The canyon walls have receded into the background as the landscape opens up completely.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic confines of a narrow canyon into a vast, open desert expanse. It begins with the character walking along a sandy dirt path flanked by towering red rock walls and sparse vegetation, moving steadily toward a bright light at the end of the passage. As the character approaches the exit, the canyon gradually widens and the rock walls fall away to the sides, revealing distant mesas and a broadening horizon under an open sky. The scene then expands completely as the character emerges onto a wide sandy plain, with the once-looming canyon walls receding into the background. Finally, the landscape opens up entirely, leaving the character to walk across a sweeping desert floor surrounded by low hills and distant rock formations.
